ham.subject: Scheduled VPN Maintenance – Action Required
ham.body:
Dear Team,

Please be advised that the corporate VPN will undergo maintenance during 02:00–04:00 UTC on Friday, April 20. During this window, you will be unable to connect to the corporate network.

We apologize for any inconvenience and thank you for your cooperation.

If you have any questions or require assistance, please contact IT Support via our internal portal: <URL>.

Best regards,
IT Operations

spam.subject: Immediate Action Required: Join the Secure Meeting Now
spam.body:
Dear [Recipient Name],

We have scheduled a critical Zoom/Teams meeting to discuss urgent company-wide financial updates. Your participation is mandatory. Please join the meeting by clicking the link below:

<URL>

If you fail to join within 30 minutes, your account will be automatically suspended and you may lose access to company resources. This is a mandatory compliance requirement.

Please confirm your attendance by replying to this email.

Best,
Corporate Compliance Team
